response.justification: Wei Chen has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical versatility across languages (including C, C++, D, JavaScript/TypeScript), and a proven track record in building scalable systems and open-source tools, but lacks explicit evidence of leading experimentation platforms, telemetry infrastructure, or AI-driven growth systems at enterprise scale — key requirements for this Principal role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across languages including C, C++, JavaScript/TypeScript, and DLang
Proven ability to design and ship scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective, real-time microservices)
Strong open-source contributions and technical mentorship through workshops and tools
concerns: No clear evidence of building or leading experimentation, feature-flagging, or growth measurement platforms
Limited visibility into metrics, statistical analysis, or bias/risk controls in experimentation workflows
Experience with AI tools for engineering velocity is mentioned vaguely, not demonstrated with impact
